completed_steps.summary: Classified as monorepo with 3 parts: client (desktop/Electron 40), server (backend/Fastify 5), shared (library/TypeScript).
Found 55 existing docs. AI_Sales_Tools_Report.md flagged as stray file.
Tech stack analyzed exhaustively (168 source files read across all 3 parts).
Conditional analysis: 17 API endpoints, 6 DB tables, 40 UI components, 10 stores, 7 services documented.
Source tree documented with ~197 files, 10 critical folders, 5 entry points.
Development guide written: prerequisites, env vars, NPM scripts, DB management, testing, deployment, CI/CD.
Integration architecture: 6 integration points (shared imports, REST, WebSocket, WebRTC/mediasoup, Electron IPC, external).
Architecture docs written for client (Electron multi-process + React) and server (Fastify plugin-based + mediasoup SFU).
Project overview updated with full implementation status (all 6 epics complete), metrics, and architectural decisions.
Master index.md generated with links to all 11 generated docs and 55 existing docs. Zero incomplete markers.
Validation complete: 0 incomplete markers, all 12 files generated, 2577 lines of documentation, project-parts.json created.

project_classification.primary_tech: Electron 40 + React 19, Fastify 5 + SQLite, TypeScript shared lib
